column1: _____ of these machines is suitable for the work you want to do. You can use them.
That evening my mother spoke with such a quiet anger that Aunt Milly was intimidated. After that _____ of them was ever willing to take up the subject.
The first time we met after the ball, _____ of us said a word that was not trivial.
The news did not shock _____ of them.
There is a train at 11.30 and one at 12.05. _____ train will get you to Oxford in time for the meeting.
I have got 2 brothers. _____ brother has been abroad yet.
My wife and I watched him make the parcel but he took no notice of _____ of us.
The houses on _____ side were tall and big.
I have travelled by both trains and _____ train had a restaurant car.
There was a lamp at _____ end of the street.
